---
title: "Invalid Objective Markers"
description: "A fixture for malformed objective marker diagnostics."
audience: "Authors"
duration: "5 minutes"
level: "beginner"
---

## Overview

These objective markers should fail with source-locatable errors.

## Learning Objectives

- [] Missing objective ID and text.
- [Bad_ID] Invalid uppercase and underscore ID.
- [valid-id]
- [valid-id Valid text with a missing closing bracket.

## Section: Diagnostics

The invalid marker cases are kept in a non-raw test fixture.

## Key Takeaways

- Invalid objective syntax should be fixed by the author.
